title: Madhura Karachi Song Lyrics Vetrivel Sakthivel

seo.title: Madhura Karachi Song Lyrics Vetrivel Sakthivel
seo.description: Full Madhura Karachi songs lyrics, Vetrivel Sakthivel Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Srikanth Deva, Singer(s): Mukesh, Srilekha Parthasarathy.
seo.keywords: Vetrivel Sakthivel, Srikanth Deva, Mukesh, Srilekha Parthasarathy, Madhura Karachi full lyrics, Vetrivel Sakthivel songs lyrics, Madhura Karachi lyrics snippets, Madhura Karachi WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Madhura Karachi lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Madhura Karachi expresses joy and celebration, highlighting sweet moments in life.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Vetrivel Sakthivel, the song is featured during a festive celebration, showcasing the characters' happiness and togetherness.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Mukesh and Srilekha Parthasarathy.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Madhura Karachi was composed by Srikanth Deva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 9, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Madhura Karachi from Vetrivel Sakthivel radiates a joyful and celebratory vibe, making it perfect for festive occasions. It showcases the playful banter between the lead characters, encapsulating the essence of happiness and togetherness. The lively duet by Mukesh and Srilekha Parthasarathy, combined with Srikanth Deva's vibrant composition, evokes feelings of joy and excitement. This song is a delightful reminder of the sweet moments in life that deserve to be celebrated.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Madhura Karachi from the movie Vetrivel Sakthivel is a delightful duet that captures the essence of joy and celebration. With the enchanting voices of Mukesh and Srilekha Parthasarathy, this song brings a vibrant energy that is hard to resist. The lively composition by Srikanth Deva perfectly complements the playful lyrics, making it a must-listen for any festive occasion.
stanzaMeanings: Oh sweet place, sweet place
Oh sweet place, the beautiful sun has come. In your little heart, the time has come like a wave.
I have come to the sweet place for you. I will give you everything from my little heart, uncle.
It's like a sweet sound, like a sweet sound, just like a sweet sound.
The water has turned into a garden, oh leader, oh leader, please hold on, oh leader.
Shall we bathe in the water of Vaigai? Shall we sing from the beginning to the end?
We can bathe in the water of Vaigai. We can sing from the beginning to the end.
Oh sweet place, the beautiful sun has come. In your little heart, the time has come like a wave.
Like a betel leaf that has come, it stands like a king, looking like a morning sun in a beautiful eye.
The beautiful mountain is shining with lightning, it will come to you, it will come to you, don't worry.
You have gone away, child, is it not a child? Tell me, is it not?
Don't ask me to tell, uncle, I will give you everything, I am crazy, uncle.
Oh sweet place, I have come to the sweet place..
Your thoughts, your thoughts are my thoughts, your thoughts. When your eyes are closed and opened, your smile is in every story.
Hey little eyes, sweet little one, you are like a shining light.
To go to heaven, show me the way, little one.
In the little things, the pearl is shining, the beauty is flowing on the screen.
Shall we build a big house? No, we don't want that, uncle.
Oh sweet place, the beautiful sun has come. In your little heart, the time has come like a wave.
I have come to the sweet place for you. I will give you everything from my little heart, uncle.
It's like a sweet sound, like a sweet sound, just like a sweet sound.
The water has turned into a garden, oh leader, oh leader, please hold on, oh leader.
Shall we bathe in the water of Vaigai? Shall we sing from the beginning to the end?
We can bathe in the water of Vaigai. We can sing from the beginning to the end.
Oh sweet place, sweet place
